_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communicate the value of information technology (IT) security throughout all levels of the organization stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical executive stakeholders in terms of business risk and operational impact.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-004 (SP, cosine: 0.530), DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.530).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.514). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only terms [communicate, information, levels, organization, security, technology] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, communicating, data, executive, impact, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.878, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Communicate the value of information technology (IT) security throughout all lev" and "Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical execu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.542 ≈ STS 0.514 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [stakeholders] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only: [communicate, information, levels, organization, security, technology]. WIDAI-only: [business, communicating, data, executive, impact, issues].
